engagementModes.title: Growing product companies
engagementModes.description: Guidance to refine existing formulas, investigate performance issues, and prepare updates for broader distribution.

engagementModes.title: Established manufacturers
engagementModes.description: Collaborative technical support for product improvement projects, reformulation initiatives, and launch timelines.
